mapper.select: SELECT * FROM charging_station ORDER BY name
SELECT * FROM charging_station WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY name

SELECT *, (6371 * ACOS(COS(RADIANS(#{latitude})) * COS(RADIANS(latitude)) * COS(RADIANS(longitude) - RADIANS(#{longitude})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{latitude})) * SIN(RADIANS(latitude)))) * 1000 AS distance_meters FROM charging_station WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND (6371 * ACOS(COS(RADIANS(#{latitude})) * COS(RADIANS(latitude)) * COS(RADIANS(longitude) - RADIANS(#{longitude})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{latitude})) * SIN(RADIANS(latitude)))) * 1000 <= #{radius} ORDER BY distance_meters ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE charging_station SET name = #{name}, address = #{address}, longitude = #{longitude}, latitude = #{latitude}, phone = #{phone}, status = #{status}, available_count = #{availableCount}, total_count = #{totalCount}, business_hours = #{businessHours} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE charging_station SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE charging_station SET available_count = #{availableCount} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM charging_station WHERE id IN
#{id}
